title: Comprehensive team name normalization beyond spec
evidence: src/normalize.rs:5-65 — normalize_team() strips accents, removes state suffixes (-SP, -RJ), drops filler words (futebol clube, sport club, etc.), handles parenthesized country codes
suggestion: No action needed — addresses the Data Quality Notes in TASK.md about team name variations

title: BDD-style integration tests match spec scenarios
evidence: tests/bdd_scenarios.rs — 15 scenario tests directly map to the example queries in TASK.md (Fla-Flu derby, Palmeiras 2023, Copa do Brasil, Corinthians home record, etc.)
suggestion: No action needed — good practice that validates spec conformance

title: End-to-end MCP stdio integration test
evidence: tests/mcp_stdio.rs:15-102 — spawns the compiled binary, drives JSON-RPC handshake over stdin/stdout, verifies initialize + tools/list + tools/call
suggestion: No action needed — validates the full MCP protocol flow
